summary: Testing complete for Multiple Roles per User and Reportes Técnicos features. Backend 16/16 tests passed. Frontend UI verified all components working. Fixed ReporteCreate model to accept firma_cliente_base64 and cliente_firma_nombre.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>/<tbody>' - React DevTools overlay issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Multiple roles per user working correctly - checkboxes allow selecting multiple roles
Reportes Técnicos API fully functional - create, get, estadisticas endpoints all working
Signature validation working - backend requires firma_cliente_base64 and cliente_firma_nombre
Materials consumidos can be added dynamically in the frontend
Services filtered correctly for reportes (only aprobado/en_proceso services shown)
seed_data_creation: Test users and reportes created during pytest were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple roles feature and Reportes Técnicos are fully implemented. Users can have multiple roles selected via checkboxes (Técnico, Asesor, Supervisor, Administrador). Reportes page allows creating technical reports with: service selection, work description, observations, time, materials, photos, and digital signature. The /api/reportes/estadisticas endpoint provides KPIs for Power BI integration. Services must be in 'aprobado' or 'en_proceso' state to appear in reportes service selector.

backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates user with multiple roles array
GET /api/users - returns users with roles array
POST /api/reportes - creates reporte with materials, photos, signature
GET /api/reportes - lists all reportes with filtering by servicio_id
Validation: reporte requires servicio_id, trabajo_realizado, firma, firma_nombre
frontend: Users page shows role badges for each user
Create User modal has role checkboxes for multiple selection
Edit User modal shows current roles and allows adding/removing
Reportes page loads with informational message
Create Report modal has all sections: service, work, observations, time, materials, photos, signature
Materials can be added with name, quantity, and unit
Photo upload section present with 5MB limit notice
Signature canvas with 'Guardar Firma' and 'Limpiar' buttons
Form validation shows appropriate error messages

bug_fixes_applied.issue: ReporteCreate model was missing firma_cliente_base64 and cliente_firma_nombre fields
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added firma_cliente_base64: Optional[str] and cliente_firma_nombre: Optional[str] to ReporteCreate class
